name: Bill Cosby

acts.description: Drugged and sexually assaulted approximately 60 women over four decades
Conviction overturned on procedural technicality despite admitted drugging of women

behavior_summary: America's dad admitted to obtaining quaaludes to give to women he wanted to have sex with. Roughly 60 accusers. Conviction overturned on a technicality. Still alive.

art.summary: Groundbreaking comedian who defined family sitcoms and was the first Black actor to lead a dramatic TV series. His cultural impact is enormous and deeply poisoned.

accountability_events: 2021 conviction overturned by Pennsylvania Supreme Court

verdict.blurb: He built America's most beloved family while systematically drugging and assaulting women for forty years. The Cosby Show isn't just contaminated — it's the mask. Rewatching it now, you can't unsee the man wearing it.
